title: Shadow Depth Enforcement on Open Problems

analysis.object: T534: Shadow Depth Enforcement on Open Problems depth analysis

bsd_shadow.description: BSD: EML-inf Sha casts EML-2 cardinality shadow; BSD formula is the shadow
bsd_shadow.reason: Shadow enforcement: Sha(E) is EML-inf; #Sha(E) is its EML-2 shadow

hodge_shadow.description: Hodge: EML-inf motive casts EML-2 cohomology shadow; period matrix is shadow
hodge_shadow.reason: Period matrix entries are EML-2 measurements of EML-inf motivic structure

ym_shadow.description: YM: EML-inf quantum field theory casts EML-2 mass gap shadow
ym_shadow.reason: Mass gap value is EML-2 measurement shadow of EML-inf QFT

ns_shadow.description: NS: EML-inf turbulence casts EML-3 statistical shadow (Kolmogorov spectrum)
ns_shadow.reason: K41 spectrum is EML-3 shadow of EML-inf turbulent cascade
